name: Medium Ensemble
description: Performers in coordinated action, feeding off each other's energy.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Bodies move in shared rhythm, a single organism made of many.
{setting}. The energy between them is its own kind of music.
{setting}. Each performer a thread, the pattern emerging from their weave.

1: {subject}, center frame, facing camera at a three-quarter angle.
2: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right.
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left, mirrored position.
3: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right, slightly forward of the others.
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left, slightly behind.
4: {subject}, far left of frame, facing right, foreground.
{subject}, far right of frame, facing left, slightly behind the others.

background_pool: Concert stage with vertical light bars in cyan and magenta, haze machines creating volumetric beams between the figures
Dance studio with wooden floor and floor-to-ceiling windows, late afternoon sun casting long warm rectangles across the space
Underground venue with brick walls, string lights crisscrossing overhead, the close crowd suggested by blurred foreground shapes
Theater stage with heavy velvet curtains partially drawn, a single warm wash light covering the performing area
action_pool: Arms raised overhead, hands clasped together
Torso twisted dynamically, one shoulder leading
Head thrown back, both arms outstretched to the sides
One leg extended fully, arms carved in opposition
Body curved in a deep arc, spine flexed
Shoulders popping in quick succession, arms loose
Spinning, hair and limbs centrifuged outward
dropping low, thighs parallel, chest upright
Hands locked together at center, elbows driven outward
